docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY ELLIS, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATION LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-09-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF NANCY ELLIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATION LLC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FE WAS $130.00 SERVED JUN-11-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATION LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLIS, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATION LLC $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,705.00, JUDGMENT AMENDED TO REMOVE THE AUTHORIZED AGENT OF SERVICE FROM THE PARTY/LITIGANT LIST DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ELLIS, NANCY

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS, NANCY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLIS, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATION LLC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATION LLC
